name: Autonomous urban passenger-miles share
whyItMatters: Direct check on city-first deployment timing.
currentStatus: Internal log from operator disclosures and third-party estimates; Q1 2026 baseline pending.
interpretation: Faster share gain in target metros supports operator scale economics; stagnation after permit expansion suggests unit-economics or execution constraints.

name: Accident frequency — ADS vs. human baseline
currentStatus: Awaiting comparable cohort refresh; no single public series is sufficient.
interpretation: Persistent ADS inferiority on like-for-like exposure extends adoption and liability timelines; convergence supports faster pool repricing.

name: Personal-auto combined ratio trajectory
whyItMatters: Maps technology and loss-cost trends to P&C results.
currentStatus: Reviewed each sector earnings round; weather and severity noise require multi-quarter smoothing.
interpretation: Structural improvement without a frequency story while AV miles rise would weaken the short-exposure leg; sustained pressure with rising miles fits the thesis.

name: Regulatory milestones
whyItMatters: Governance often caps domain before engineering.
currentStatus: Checklist: permits granted, expansions, suspensions, incident responses (updated quarterly).
interpretation: Net wider domains and faster recovery after incidents support deployment; repeated retrenchment invalidates linear scaling.

name: Used passenger vehicle residuals
whyItMatters: Proxy for ownership vs. on-demand substitution.
currentStatus: Wholesale index with urban vs. national splits; watchlist only until next print.
interpretation: Sustained softness in relevant segments supports utilization shift; broad strength challenges urban ownership erosion speed.

name: Fleet utilization economics
currentStatus: Operator KPIs where disclosed; otherwise inferred from trip and fleet proxies.
interpretation: Rising utilization without destructive pricing supports the base path; flat utilization with discounting suggests oversupply.
